name: amasty/module-shopby-hyva-compatibility
description: This module makes Amasty Improved Layered Navigation by Amasty compatible with Hyvä Themes

suggest.amasty/module-shopby-grouped-options-hyv: When using Hyva, this module ensures compatibility between Amasty Shopby and Grouped Options.
suggest.amasty/module-shop-by-filter-highlight-h: Install module-shop-by-filter-highlight-hyva module to activate the integration Filter Highlight module with Hyva Theme.
